title: [Transforms][OpCountAnalysis] Add PrintOpCountPass
body:
This adds a proper pass to export the data generated by the analysis upstreamed in #7644 and deprecates the test pass that existed before. It's in Transform to align where the similar upstream MLIR pass is found, but I'd be easily swayed on putting it elsewhere.

Unfortunately couldn't find a nice way to FileCheck test the JSON output as you don't seem to be able to have a CHECK-DAG node span multiple lines (although I could add a sorting flag if we're very set on testing it, just didn't bother here as it seems like a slightly redundant flag for output that's realistically always going to be imported elsewhere for processing).
